codex_consult.feedback_summary: Finding 1 (in_scope_minor): Provenance claim 'No under-reporting or over-reporting' was overstated — git diff --name-only e109534 returns 29 paths total (cross-worker changes), not exclusively the 6 F-scoped files. The 6 target files are all present. PROPOSED_FIX: qualify the provenance statement. Finding 2 (OBSERVATION_ONLY): Codex independently ran both test scripts — Results: PASS=12 FAIL=0 on verify-stop-spec-session-isolation.sh, clean exit 0 on test-lock-detection.sh. Modes 755 confirmed. Stale narrative absent. No blocker against any AC. PASS is warranted.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Provenance statement updated in regression_test_results to clarify the 29-file diff includes cross-worker unrelated changes; all 6 F-scoped files are confirmed present. Codex live test execution results (12/12 PASS) added to regression_test_results as evidence.
